name: Miniatures
short_description: Miniatures is a cozy puzzle game where you start a journey in the world of a bookworm girl. In this journey, you're tasked with solving puzzles of miniature-style illustrations to create cities by fitting blocks, making paths by aligning roads & rivers and reanimating landmarks by matching pieces.
detailed_description:
Miniatures is a cozy puzzle game where you start a journey in the world of a bookworm girl. In this journey, you're tasked with solving puzzles of miniature-style illustrations to create cities by fitting blocks, making paths by aligning roads & rivers and reanimating landmarks by matching pieces.

Some of the features of the game!

- Creating the cities as you like while solving puzzles

- Matching pieces of the forgotten tombs, temples and landmarks

- Relaxing atmosphere and cozy gameplay

- "Miniature" art-style inspired by illuminated manuscripts



Within this 2D journey, players are invited for a travel like sight-seeings which is the essence of the book the game inspired by. Miniatures game is inspired by the works of an Ottoman statesman "Matrakçı Nasuh". In his book called "Beyân-ı Menâzil-i Sefer-i Irâkeyn", he includes lovely miniature style paintings of the places that the imperial army passed by, stopped at or visited for various reasons.
